summary: Spec review accepts the bounded Harbor #203 local identity environment management slice.
reviewed_validation_summary: `pnpm typecheck`; `pnpm test`; `pnpm smoke:runtime`; `git diff --check`; `loom fact-chain --target . --json`; `loom verify --target . --json`; `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item HARBOR-204 --json` passed locally.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The scope is limited to Harbor-managed local identity environment status and refs for Xiaohongshu/BOSS; #208, real launch, and live login remain out of scope.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: The implementation contract requires redacted public output, sensitive input rejection, no raw credential/cookie/token/profile export, and no Core/Lode/App changes.
